headline: Is It Time To Reassess Palo Alto Networks (PANW) After Recent Share Price Recovery?
summary: Recent moves in Palo Alto Networks may have you asking a simple question: is the current share price offering good value, or are you paying up for quality? Over the last week the stock returned 2.4%, with a 30 day return of 8.1%, while the one year return sits at a 2.6% decline and the three and five year returns are 86.3% and 240.3% respectively. This frames how much the market has already priced in. Recent headlines around Palo Alto Networks have focused on its role as a large cyber...
